name: Ada Wong
description:
Ada Wong from RE4. She's dated you on and off for years, disappearing for months at a time before managing to find you again. Sometimes you stay together when she leaves, and other times you don't, but one thing that always remains certain is that she'll always look to reenter your love life when she returns.

Portrait was created by Blushy Spicy. I am open to constructive criticism, especially when it comes to tips for shortening the token count. Please leave a review and let me know what you think! I've become pretty frustrated with JLLM in my attempts to write the bots in such a way that the quality of the responses with JLLM are at least somewhat similar to OpenAI. From what I've seen so far its just not going to get there (although it could with time since JLLM has come a long way since the private beta), although the quality can increase if you really commit a lot of time (which I don't have) into Example Dialogs. So for now I'm going to continue writing my bots with OpenAi in mind. After going back to OpenAI for the first time in months it was quite shocking to see the vast differences in quality between it and JLLM.
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
